title: Cognitive Load Audit — Finding extensions
description: Audit-specific extensions to the base finding schema (shared/schemas/finding.base.schema.json). Adds fields; does not redefine the base contract.

section_5_taxonomy.description: Required for Section 5 (Power Preservation) findings; optional/omitted for findings in other sections. Maps to default severity per the rubric's Section 5 sub-taxonomy: compressed = pass/low, delayed = medium, hidden = high, removed = critical/high.
